reviews.author: Quoc Viet Tran
reviews.text: Nam Du Island deserves a full 5/5! It’s a beautiful small island in the south of Vietnam with stunning natural scenery and a peaceful, laid-back vibe. The seafood is fresh and delicious, especially when enjoyed by the sea. The ocean is warm, clear, and perfect for swimming or snorkeling. Life on the island feels simple, close to nature, and very relaxing. What’s also great is the growing awareness among locals and visitors to protect the environment — reducing waste, limiting plastic use, and keeping the beaches clean. It’s a wonderful place to enjoy nature while contributing to its preservation.

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: In the cloudy day, but white sand and emerald water beaches make me want to stay more. Really nice and desert island! So small islands, you can hire a boat to go around islands and try diving and see beautiful coral reefs.

reviews.author: Duong Maggie
reviews.text: Peaceful, cheap, and welcoming. But it takes 12hrs traveling to get here from Hanoi (plane, bus ride, and ship). This is the clearest beach with the most leveled seabed I've ever been to in Vietnam. 💝 If you come visit this place, definitely checkout Hai San Minh Sang and indulge yourself with series of good food at a very cheap price. The rock oysters are something unique here. You can also rent out a boat for your party at a price of 3-3.5mil to go visit the other islands, snorkelling, fishing.... which was quite fun and pleasant as well.

reviews.author: Nhat-Vu Dang
reviews.text: We were very excited when we initially read the reviews about Nam Du island and it’s pristine beaches and waters, but it couldn’t be further from the descriptions! We constantly saw locals dump loads of trash directly into the ocean (while trash bins are just a few steps away..!!)! It’s very disheartening to see how little the locals care about their environment. We went to Bãi Cây Mến which was completely littered with plastic, a real shame, the island could’ve been so stunning!

reviews.author: Phuong Nguyen
reviews.text: One of my favourite island that I’d like to come back again. It was my alone trips from Phu Quoc island to Rach Gia harbors by Superdong fast ferry (330k VND one way ticket - it takes 3 and half hour). I stay one night there wait for an early ship in the morning to Nam Du island (it’s 210k VND one way ticket - about 2 and half hour). Nowadays, Supdong may have direct way from Phu Quoc Island to Nam Du island. Nam Du is a super beautiful, quiet and private island but quite small. For staying, I booked a room at little lovely homestay which has a few rooms, called “The Stone beach” because it has many kind of various colorful stones here (Bai Soi - in Vietnamese). You can find more information about this homestay in my review about “Bai Soi beach” and other homestay nearby. For eating seafood - I specially love the local streets food, highly recommended for the seafoods market is the best place with a lot of fresh nails🐚, fishs 🐟🐠, blue crab 🦀 , octopus 🐙, shrimp🦐, squid🦑, scallops,... all of these seafood are good for BBQ or hot pot... For sight seeing, you can rent a motorcycle (120k-150k VND/day) it takes only 1 hour driving for whole island. Feeling the cool wind and the sunlights on your face while driving that was really wonderful, then take a little time to watch the silent ocean and observe the interesting living of people here on the sea..... There is a very nice and peaceful beach called “Bai Men” with long beach 🏖 , white sand, and clear water... you can enjoy lunch at the local seafood restaurant over there as well. Actually, you could book a daily tour to travel on the sea to other islands near there. If you’re a diving fan club kindly ask the tour guide for the details. The local guides are nice friendly and helpful, no worries. Another thing I deeply love “Bai Soi beach” where I had stayed because I could play and did meditation with the stones by making the art of stone balancing ... It’s really relaxing time when I was alone with the nature. Last but not least, if the island has a better way to solve the problems with garbage it would be extremely amazing island for travel development. #NamDuisland #2017

reviews.author: Hiếu Huỳnh
reviews.text: This is one of the most beautiful islands in Kien Giang province where natural beauty is still remaining! Only 2 hours on high speed ferry from Rach Gia port

reviews.author: Thao Tran
reviews.text: This island has outstanding landscape. You could hire a motorbike and explore it yourself. While riding around the island, it's the time you are overwhelmed by the view from the higher place. Besides, you would love to take a small tour to travel other small islands near by. This is the perfect time to have yourself numerous fascinating pics. During the tour, you will be eating seafood poridge and diving to see coral. In term of food, I would say that I have no superb photos 'cause when I see the food served on the table, I just can't wait to taste it!!!!!!!! So good!!!!! The seafood is extremely fresh with affordable price. I bet you would love traveling to this island if you like peaceful place without crowd or commercialization.

reviews.author: Phil Langdon
reviews.text: Apr 21 Foreigners are now allowed onto the island, however, check with tour operators, you need special paper work, covid 19 declaration and police interview when you get there. Very beautiful mountainous areas and magnificent beaches. Beach sand is like talcum powder, great for a massage. Hotels and guesthouses are a bit how’s your father, but if you come expecting to rough it a bit, you will be ok. You need some mountain goat blood in you for some hotels. Power and water was off for 1 night when I was there, genset breakdown! Fantastic seafood, lots of the usual Vietnamese markets and local cuisine. Hire a motor bike, (follow the rules) and go sight seeing. You cant go wrong. Very enjoyable

reviews.author: Daniel
reviews.text: A wonderful, out of the way little paradise of an island perfect for a short getaway. Recommend staying for two days at most. One day for exploring the island, which only takes 30-40 minutes to drive a complete loop around with just a few sites to see. And another day for taking a boat tour to Hon Dau and Hon Mai islands as well as snorkeling. Aside from Bai Cay Men Beach, most of the shore is rocky and would be hard to swim in without footwear. And other than the two designated beaches (Bai Cay Men and Bai Soi), the shore is going to be filthy and full of litter washing ashore.

reviews.author: Tfarm
reviews.text: The island is ideal with beautiful beaches and clear water. Great for group adventure and exploring. Seafood is an addition to its beauty.

reviews.author: Mr Do
reviews.text: A beautiful island. Easy to access (only 2 hrs and 15 mins by fast boat from Rach Gia). Not many tourists and less crowded than the nearby badly urbanized Phu Quoc island. A touch to the finest nature. There are some small beautiful and crystal clear water beaches on the island and nearby islets. Friendly local people. Seafood is great. Should implement stronger measures to stop littering otherwise the island would be destroyed anytime sooner or later.

reviews.author: Hien Nguyen
reviews.text: Nam Du Island, located in Kien Giang Province, is one of the most stunning island destinations in southern Vietnam. Often compared to a miniature version of Phu Quoc, Nam Du impresses visitors with its untouched beauty and peaceful atmosphere. The turquoise sea, long stretches of white sandy beaches, and rows of tall coconut trees create a postcard-perfect tropical paradise. What makes Nam Du special is its raw and authentic charm. Unlike heavily commercialized resorts, the island still feels natural and quiet. Local fishing villages add a cultural touch, where visitors can experience fresh seafood, explore simple stilt houses, and interact with hospitable islanders. The roads winding around the island offer breathtaking views of the coastline, especially at sunrise and sunset. Some of the most famous spots include Bai Men, with its soft sand and coconut groves, and Hon Mau, known for its five-color beaches. Snorkeling around coral reefs is also a must-do activity. For me, Nam Du is not only beautiful but also serene—a place to slow down, reconnect with nature, and appreciate the purity of Vietnam’s islands.

reviews.author: Sketcher Visket
reviews.text: Beautiful islands. For foreigners who want visit here need guarantee by tourism company. But need to think about environment mattes because some residents here through out wastes on the sea directly.

reviews.author: Thien Nguyen
reviews.text: its really a beautiful island with beautiful beaches, i do recommend comming here, just look at the photos!!!

reviews.author: Ryan đi tùm lum
reviews.text: Beautiful island, especially the mến beach. Didnt have a chance to go to the lighthouse. I'll be back some day

reviews.author: Tri Bui
reviews.text: Rent a bike and drive around the island. You can camp at Bai Cay Men beach.

reviews.author: Jane Duong
reviews.text: Breathtaking beauty of nature. Yet, quite commercialised already

reviews.author: Huynh Nguyen
reviews.text: Beautiful scenery, fresh sea food.

reviews.author: Kat N
reviews.text: This island is just breath taking, although it is still unknown to most travellers. The island still needs a lot of work for it to be amazing, most likely resorts and hotels will be available in the future. Just a Note to keep in mind before planning your trip to Nam Du in Vietnam island, if you're a foreigner (non-Vietnamese residents).They will not allow you to enter without proper documentation, check online for further details.

reviews.author: An Explores
reviews.text: Nam Du is really beautiful but the poor waste treatment make the island quite dirty, the pier is full of trash, it’s really sad when the nature there is so beautiful. I hope it can be improved, at least the local ppl should show the example and preserve their home

reviews.author: Paul Park
reviews.text: Nam Du hasnt been developed fot tourism. It has many super beautiful and clean beaches.

reviews.author: TRAN GIAO
reviews.text: great place with beautiful beaches

reviews.author: Doan Juno
reviews.text: The place has a landscape like paradise

reviews.author: John Peng
reviews.text: No night activities, consider twice before book the tour

reviews.author: Khiet Phan (Kit)
reviews.text: The island is wonderful, with beautiful sightseeing and delicious seafood. However, foreigners are not allowed here.

reviews.author: Nicolas Devos
reviews.text: Great seafood. 1 nice beach and 1 nice hotel
